raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/2025, I purchased a XXXX XXXX laptop from Best Buy Online, amounting to {$4200.00}. The laptop was shipped via XXXX with a tracking number, with an expected delivery date of XX/XX/2025. 

The laptop did not arrive at scheduled, disappeared from XXXX system on XX/XX/XXXX, reappeared the next day, and was delivered on XX/XX/2025. 

The box was damaged and it is clear it had been opened and resealed. The box contained a XXXX XXXX XXXX box that had been previously opened and contained 'weights ' to simulate the weight of the laptop. I have the box and have provided pictures to both Best Buy and Citibank. 

I went to a local Best Buy store to report this issue. I was told to open a case with Best Buy. I also opened a case with Citibank, the Best Buy Credit Card provider. A case was opened with XXXX  with the tracking number but I am unable to get a response from them. 

On XX/XX/XXXX I received a letter from Citibank stating that the issue was resolved and credit issued to my account. 

On XX/XX/XXXX I received a letter from Citibank stating that my claim is denied and charged my account. 

I contacted my Best Buy agent via email at XXXX but have received no response to date. 

I contacted Citibank via phone and was told to re-submit my claim, which I did in writing via a letter dated XX/XX/XXXX. 

I feel that Best Buy and Citibank are not acting in good faith. I hereby request assistance to resolve this issue and have my account credited back the full amount.
